objective: Wire Slice B hook hardening for issue #640: fix settings.json paths, backlog-check.sh, check-errors.sh, governance-check.sh, pre-session-context.sh, backlog_match.py, and fail_fast_state.py to be $HOME-anchored and fail-closed.
scope_boundary: Implementation child lane under issue #638 (Slice B: Hook Wiring).

Owns the policy/hook/CI hardening slice: .claude/settings.json, hooks/backlog-check.sh, hooks/check-errors.sh, hooks/governance-check.sh, hooks/pre-session-context.sh, scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py, scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py, and issue-local governance artifacts.
All hook paths must be $HOME-anchored and not use git rev-parse or $PWD.
PostToolUse * block in settings.json must point to check-errors.sh.
backlog-check.sh must call backlog_match.py and exit non-zero when no match.
out_of_scope: Slice A (CI/SHA rework) — owned by issue #641.
Slice C and beyond — separate lanes.
Any changes to scripts outside scripts/overlord/backlog_match.py and scripts/overlord/fail_fast_state.py.
Broad standards rewrite or governance epic closure.
Any changes to .github/workflows/ beyond what is already in the branch diff.
research_summary: Parent epic #638 required Slice B hook hardening to fix settings.json path issues, wire check-errors.sh into PostToolUse, implement backlog_match.py and fail_fast_state.py, and ensure all hook paths are $HOME-anchored. Worker (claude-sonnet-4-6) implemented all AC1-AC8 items. CI failures remain due to missing structured plan, execution scope, closeout, and handoff artifacts.

sprints.name: Hook Wiring Implementation
sprints.goal: Fix all settings.json path references, wire check-errors.sh, implement backlog_match.py and fail_fast_state.py, and ensure all hook paths are $HOME-anchored.
tasks: Fix settings.json: remove git rev-parse/$PWD, use $HOME-anchored paths throughout.
Implement hooks/backlog-check.sh calling backlog_match.py; exit non-zero when no match.
Implement hooks/check-errors.sh calling fail_fast_state.py check and record.
Create all required governance artifacts: structured plan, execution scope, validation, handoff, closeout.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: settings.json has no git rev-parse or $PWD; all $HOME-anchored.
AC2: PostToolUse * block points to check-errors.sh.
AC3: backlog-check.sh calls backlog_match.py; exits non-zero when no match.
AC4: check-errors.sh calls fail_fast_state.py check and record.
AC7: $HOME-anchored paths resolve correctly regardless of CWD.

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify all AC items are met and governance artifacts are complete and valid.
specialist_reviews.summary: All AC1-AC8 items implemented. settings.json uses $HOME-anchored paths. PostToolUse wired to check-errors.sh. backlog_match.py and fail_fast_state.py implemented. Governance artifacts created and validated.

material_deviation_rules: Any edit to .github/workflows/ not already in the diff for issue #640 is a material deviation.
Any edit outside the bounded hook/settings/scripts surfaces listed in scope_boundary is a material deviation.
Any claim that issue #640 closes governance enforcement beyond the Slice B hook wiring surface is a material deviation.
Any implementation that uses git rev-parse or $PWD in settings.json or hooks is a material deviation.
